channel.title: New TV Shows
channel.description: Newest TV shows on Netflix, Disney+, MGM+, Apple TV+, Prime Video, Sky Max

item.title: Young Farts Trailer Parts
item.description: Small-town brothers Jagger and Dawson run Young Farts RV Parts, a multi-million-dollar business where they turn trailer trash into cash. Between outrageous schemes, chaotic stunts, and big-hearted hijinks, these brothers chase one wild idea after the next - all for the love of their family and the empire they’re building.

item.title: Ride or Die
item.description: Best friends, Judith and Debbie, know everything about each other … well, almost everything. Judith has been living a double life that Debbie knows nothing about: she is a highly trained assassin. When a hit goes horribly wrong, Judith and Debbie must go on the run together and work to repair their broken friendship—all while being targeted by a mysterious enemy who wants them dead. And only together, can they solve this layered mystery.

item.title: Lucky
item.description: When a multi-million-dollar heist goes sideways, con artist Lucky is forced to go on the run. Pursued by both the FBI and a ruthless crime boss, Lucky must fight for her life—and a way out.

item.title: Hot Ones: Extra Heat
item.description: In this exclusive new series of specials, celebrity guests are challenges to answer spicy questions while eating even spicier wings.

item.title: Murder 101
item.description: Part teen drama, part masterclass, and part edge-of-your-seat crime investigation, follow a high school sociology class in rural Tennessee who help revive a decades-old case into a present-day hunt for a killer.

item.title: The Westies
item.description: As the Javits Center construction project ignites a battle for profit in early 1980s Hell's Kitchen, a generational rift threatens the uneasy peace between violent Irish gang the Westies and the Mafia, and draws FBI heat.
